nodes.body: <<FILL role=setup words=130 beats='{HERO} misses the last bus home at {OPENING_MOMENT}; {THRESHOLD} has stood dark since {KEEPER} vanished a year ago; tonight {LIGHT_MOTIF} flickers though no one lives there; four ways lead in from the mist, {ROUTE_A_PLACE}, {ROUTE_B_PLACE}, {ROUTE_C_PLACE}, and {ROUTE_D_PLACE}'>>
<<FILL role=rising words=105 beats='{ROUTE_A_PLACE} is cold and still, a mug of tea long gone to dust on the table; three places look worth a search, {A_DESK}, {A_SHELF}, and {A_HEARTH}'>>
<<FILL role=choice words=100 beats='{A_DESK} rolls back with a groan; {A_LOG_PAGE} lies open mid-sentence, and {A_DESK_DRAWER} beneath is locked fast'>>
<<FILL role=rising words=95 beats='the final entry stops halfway, {KEEPER} writing of {LIGHT_MOTIF} he never lit and footsteps on the shore; the words trail toward {A_CORRIDOR}'>>
<<FILL role=choice words=95 beats='{A_DESK_DRAWER} will not give; a bent letter-opener could pick it, or {HERO} could simply wrench it open and risk splitting the old wood'>>
<<FILL role=rising words=90 beats='the lock clicks and {A_DESK_DRAWER} slides free, holding {A_DESK_KEY} and a folded hall plan marked toward the tower'>>
<<FILL role=choice words=100 beats='{A_SHELF} is heavy with ships in bottles and a long row of leather logbooks; one bottle hides a rolled note, and {A_LOGBOOK} spine is worn from handling'>>
<<FILL role=rising words=90 beats='{A_BOTTLE} pops loose and a curl of paper falls out, a sketch of the tower with a hidden door inked at its foot; {A_CORRIDOR} runs that way'>>
<<FILL role=rising words=92 beats='{A_LOGBOOK} falls open to a pressed sprig of sea-holly and a margin note in {KEEPER}'s hand, follow {A_CORRIDOR} when the light burns wrong'>>
<<FILL role=choice words=98 beats='{A_HEARTH} is full of pale ash; something square did not burn, and one firebrick sits loose and off its line'>>
<<FILL role=rising words=90 beats='half {A_ASH_PHOTO} survives the ash, {KEEPER} on the gallery beside a stranger who should not be there; the print points her toward {A_CORRIDOR}'>>
<<FILL role=choice words=92 beats='behind {A_BRICK_GATE} is a shallow cavity with a cloth bundle just in reach, but the brick jams half-out and pinches her fingers'>>
<<FILL role=rising words=90 beats='the bundle holds {A_HEARTH_KEY} stamped with the tower's mark; {A_CORRIDOR} to the tower door beckons'>>
<<FILL role=choice words=100 beats='{A_CORRIDOR} runs toward the tower's inner door, but a side passage leads to {A_KITCHEN} where a draught stirs; either way ends at the same locked door'>>

choices.label: Go straight to the tower door.

nodes.body: <<FILL role=rising words=90 beats='the draught in {A_KITCHEN} comes from a gap behind the pantry; following it brings {HERO} right back to the tower's inner door from the other side'>>

choices.label: Step up to the tower door.

nodes.body: <<FILL role=rising words=95 beats='the tower's inner door stands ajar on darkness; on a hook beside it hangs {JOURNAL} she almost misses'>>
<<FILL role=rising words=108 beats='{ROUTE_B_PLACE} spirals up to the lamp room where {LIGHT_MOTIF} pulses without heat or flame; three things pull at {HERO}, {B_LENS}, {B_GALLERY}, and {B_CLOCK}'>>
<<FILL role=choice words=100 beats='up close {B_LENS} is not lit at all; {B_LENS_CRACK} throws the glow, and behind it {B_LENS_REFLECT} has been fitted where none should be'>>
<<FILL role=rising words=92 beats='through {B_LENS_CRACK} she sees the glow comes from below, not the lamp, a light climbing the shaft in the tower's heart; {B_DOWNSTAIR} leads to it'>>
<<FILL role=rising words=92 beats='{B_LENS_REFLECT} is angled to bounce a light up from deep in the tower, a trick, not a ghost; {B_DOWNSTAIR} is where the trick begins'>>
<<FILL role=choice words=98 beats='{B_GALLERY} rings the lamp room in the open fog; the iron rail is furred with rust, and the mist below hides the drop to the rocks'>>

choices.label: Peer through the fogged window instead.

nodes.body: <<FILL role=choice words=95 beats='one foot on {B_GALLERY} and {B_RAIL_GATE} shivers under her hand; it might hold for a careful circuit, or it might not'>>
<<FILL role=rising words=90 beats='through the streaked window {HERO} spots a glow leaking from a grille at the tower's base; whatever makes the light is far below the lamp'>>
<<FILL role=choice words=98 beats='{B_CLOCK} hangs on a rust-stiff chain that once drove the turning lamp; winding it might wake the mechanism, or she could follow the chain down its shaft'>>

choices.label: Follow the chain down its shaft.

nodes.body: <<FILL role=rising words=92 beats='the mechanism grinds a quarter-turn and a hatch drops open in the floor, showing {B_DOWNSTAIR} that winds into the tower's core'>>
<<FILL role=rising words=90 beats='the chain runs down a narrow shaft to a landing far below; a maintenance stair beside it offers the safer way down'>>
<<FILL role=choice words=98 beats='{B_DOWNSTAIR} splits, {B_SPIRAL} curling into the dark, or {B_HATCH} that drops more directly toward the base'>>
<<FILL role=rising words=92 beats='{B_SPIRAL} delivers {HERO} to a low landing at the tower's foot, where {JOURNAL} lies open on a stool'>>
<<FILL role=rising words=90 beats='{B_HATCH} drops her onto the same low landing, and there on a stool sits {JOURNAL}, left open'>>
<<FILL role=rising words=108 beats='below the rock {ROUTE_C_PLACE} breathe with the tide, cold and echoing; three ways open off the entrance pool, {C_PASSAGE}, {C_POOLS}, and {C_ARCH}'>>
<<FILL role=choice words=98 beats='{C_PASSAGE} narrows and {C_TIDE_GATE} at her boots is climbing; she can push deeper while the way is clear, or the tide may cut her off'>>
<<FILL role=rising words=92 beats='{C_PASSAGE} opens above the tideline onto a dry ledge and {C_ROCKSTEPS}, climbing toward the tower's base'>>
<<FILL role=choice words=96 beats='{C_POOLS} glow faintly with clinging weed, the same pale colour as the tower's light; one pool holds a dull gleam of metal under the water'>>
<<FILL role=rising words=92 beats='{C_WEED} glows cold in her palm, harmless, the very thing that paints the ghostly light; a rope handrail leads up from {C_POOLS} toward the rock stair'>>
<<FILL role=rising words=90 beats='{C_BADGE} is a keeper's tide-badge on a chain, dropped and lost; beyond the pool a rock stair climbs out of the cave'>>
<<FILL role=choice words=96 beats='{C_ARCH} is scratched with tally marks and a warning in {KEEPER}'s shorthand; {C_GAP_GATE} beyond it might be squeezed through'>>
<<FILL role=rising words=92 beats='{C_MARKS} count nights of a light that was never logged; the shorthand points to a stair up and out, away from the rising sea'>>
<<FILL role=choice words=92 beats='{C_GAP_GATE} is tight and cold; she can wriggle through to the far chamber, or feel her shoulders wedge and think better of it'>>
<<FILL role=choice words=96 beats='the cave stair brings her under the tower at last; two ways up remain, {C_WORNSTEPS} or {C_LADDER}'>>
<<FILL role=rising words=90 beats='{C_WORNSTEPS} end at a low landing inside the tower's base, where {JOURNAL} rests on a stool, left open'>>
<<FILL role=rising words=90 beats='{C_LADDER} lets her up into the same low landing, and there is {JOURNAL} on its stool, open to the last page'>>
<<FILL role=rising words=106 beats='{ROUTE_D_PLACE} smells of tar and old rope; three things catch her eye, {D_DINGHY}, {D_LOCKER}, and {D_LOFT}'>>
<<FILL role=choice words=96 beats='under {D_DINGHY}'s tarp are bundled oilskins and, tucked in the bow, {D_TIN} that rattles with something that is not water'>>
<<FILL role=rising words=90 beats='beneath the oilskins is {D_CHART} with a passage inked under the lighthouse; {D_HATCH} in the corner leads that way'>>
<<FILL role=rising words=90 beats='{D_TIN} holds a brass key and a scrap reading, the light is not a ghost, it is a signal; {D_HATCH} drops toward the tower'>>
<<FILL role=choice words=96 beats='{D_LOCKER} holds {D_ROPE} and {D_LANTERN} still half full of oil, either handy for the dark below'>>
<<FILL role=rising words=88 beats='with {D_ROPE} looped over her shoulder {HERO} spots {D_HATCH} worn smooth by boots, the way down toward the tower'>>
<<FILL role=rising words=88 beats='{D_LANTERN} catches on the third strike, throwing a warm ring of light; its glow finds {D_HATCH} in the corner'>>
<<FILL role=choice words=94 beats='the ladder to {D_LOFT} is missing rungs; she can pick her way up carefully, or trust {D_RUNG_GATE} that looks ready to give'>>
<<FILL role=rising words=90 beats='{D_LOFT} holds coils of signal flags and a diagram of lamp flashes; a trapdoor at the back drops back down beside {D_HATCH}'>>
<<FILL role=choice words=96 beats='{D_HATCH} is stiff; she can pry it up and follow the passage under the boathouse toward the tower, but {D_DOOR_GATE} is worrying loose in the wind behind her'>>

choices.label: Pry the hatch and go down.
Turn as {D_DOOR_GATE} slams in the wind.

nodes.body: <<FILL role=rising words=92 beats='the passage runs under the rock to a low landing at the tower's base, where {JOURNAL} waits open on a stool'>>

<<FILL role=choice words=118 beats='BOTTLENECK: whichever way {HERO} came, every path meets here at {JOURNAL}; its pages hold three tangled threads, {JR_LIGHT_ENTRIES}, {JR_CARGO_LEDGER}, and {JR_TUNNEL_SKETCH}'>>
<<FILL role=choice words=98 beats='{JR_LIGHT_ENTRIES} grow uneasy, {LIGHT_MOTIF} climbing the tower when no lamp is lit; two pages stand out, {JR_LIGHT_DESC} and {JR_LIGHT_DATES}'>>
<<FILL role=rising words=92 beats='{KEEPER} writes that the light is real but made, not haunted, and that its source lies below; the note ends, take {JR_HIDDEN_STAIR}'>>
<<FILL role=rising words=92 beats='{JR_LIGHT_DATES} all fall on foggy nights, the very nights {JR_CARGO_LEDGER} lists cargoes; the pattern points down {JR_HIDDEN_STAIR}'>>
<<FILL role=rising words=90 beats='both threads agree, the answer is below; a panel in the landing wall swings back on {JR_HIDDEN_STAIR} leading up into the tower's core'>>

<<FILL role=choice words=98 beats='{JR_CARGO_LEDGER} lists barrels and crates landed on dark nights and signed with a single initial that is not {KEEPER}'s; {JR_CARGO_FIGURES} and {JR_CODED_NAMES} both invite a closer look'>>
<<FILL role=choice words=94 beats='{JR_CARGO_FIGURES} do not balance, goods that came in and never left; but {JR_TORN_PAGE} has been torn out at the root'>>
<<FILL role=rising words=90 beats='{HERO} copies the crooked totals into her own notebook, proof that someone used the dark tower as a store; the trail leads to {JR_HIDDEN_STAIR}'>>
<<FILL role=rising words=90 beats='{JR_TORN_PAGE} is folded inside the back cover, naming a hidden store reached from the stair in the tower's core'>>
<<FILL role=rising words=92 beats='{JR_CODED_NAMES} unpick into a single smuggler who paid {KEEPER} to look away, then wanted the tower for himself; {JR_HIDDEN_STAIR} is the way to the truth'>>
<<FILL role=choice words=94 beats='{JR_CARGO_LEDGER} points up {JR_HIDDEN_STAIR} in the core; {JR_CELLAR_GATE} tempts her too, though its lock looks meant to stay shut'>>
<<FILL role=choice words=98 beats='{JR_TUNNEL_SKETCH} shows a tunnel running from beneath the tower out under the sea gate; {JR_FLAGSTONE} in this very landing is marked with the same cross'>>
<<FILL role=rising words=92 beats='{JR_TUNNEL_SKETCH} labels {JR_HIDDEN_STAIR} as the only dry way to the tunnel; the panel in the landing wall matches the drawing exactly'>>
<<FILL role=choice words=90 beats='{JR_FLAGSTONE} rocks but is set fast with rust and age; she can heave at it, or give up and take the drier route {JR_TUNNEL_SKETCH} marks'>>

choices.label: Give up and read the sketch instead.

nodes.body: <<FILL role=rising words=90 beats='either way {JR_TUNNEL_SKETCH} wins, the dry route is {JR_HIDDEN_STAIR}; the wall panel stands open on a cramped climb into the core'>>

<<FILL role=choice words=108 beats='BOTTLENECK: all three threads bring {HERO} to {JR_HIDDEN_STAIR} in the tower's core, {KEEPER}'s secret climb toward the light; it forks into {ST_WIND} and {ST_OUTER}'>>
<<FILL role=choice words=94 beats='{ST_WIND} is dark and close, each step worn to a dish; most are firm, but {ST_STEP_GATE} near the top sounds hollow underfoot'>>
<<FILL role=rising words=90 beats='keeping to the wall side of each step, {HERO} climbs clear to {ST_DOOR}, warm with the pale light beyond'>>
<<FILL role=choice words=94 beats='{ST_OUTER} hug the tower in the open fog, cold and slick; the wind gusts hard enough to make her wait for a lull'>>

choices.label: Wait for the wind to drop.

nodes.body: <<FILL role=rising words=88 beats='she presses to the stone until the gust dies, then climbs on; {ST_OUTER} end at {ST_DOOR} glowing softly'>>
<<FILL role=rising words=90 beats='{ST_OUTER} deliver her, breathless, to {ST_DOOR} where the pale light waits just behind'>>

<<FILL role=choice words=118 beats='BOTTLENECK: behind {ST_DOOR} lies the source of {LIGHT_MOTIF}, a small chamber where {LAMP_RIG} throws a pale glow up the tower, dressed with {C_WEED}; it is a made light, a signal, not a haunting; three ways lead down toward the tunnel, {LI_STAIR}, {LI_SHAFT}, and {LI_LADDER}'>>
<<FILL role=choice words=96 beats='{LI_STAIR} is broad and safe; {LI_CUPBOARD} is stuffed with {KEEPER}'s things, spare parts and a folded coat'>>
<<FILL role=rising words=90 beats='{LI_STAIR} winds down past the lamp-rig to a damp undercroft where {LI_TUNNEL_MOUTH} yawns dark and cool'>>
<<FILL role=choice words=92 beats='{LI_CUPBOARD} holds {LI_LENS} and {KEEPER}'s own {LI_COAT}, still smelling of pipe smoke; both feel like clues left behind'>>
<<FILL role=rising words=88 beats='{LI_LENS} is scored with the same rig-marks as the mirrors, proof the light was built by hand; {LI_STAIR} drops on to the tunnel'>>
<<FILL role=rising words=88 beats='{LI_COAT}'s pocket gives up a folded note in {KEEPER}'s hand, gone but not lost; {LI_STAIR} carries her down to {LI_TUNNEL_MOUTH}'>>
<<FILL role=choice words=94 beats='{LI_SHAFT} drops straight down on {LI_STAPLES}; {LI_ROPE_GATE} hangs beside it, and she cannot be sure which will bear her'>>
<<FILL role=rising words=90 beats='{LI_STAPLES} hold and {HERO} climbs down into the undercroft, where {LI_TUNNEL_MOUTH} opens off into the dark'>>
<<FILL role=choice words=90 beats='she leans her weight on {LI_ROPE_GATE}; the first fibres creak, and she must judge whether to trust it or {LI_STAPLES}'>>

choices.label: Feel it fray and pull back.

nodes.body: <<FILL role=choice words=92 beats='{LI_LADDER} runs down the tower's flank in thick fog; the rungs are wet and {LI_FOG_GATE} is closing until she can barely see her hands'>>
<<FILL role=rising words=90 beats='hand under hand through the murk, {HERO} reaches the foot of the tower and ducks into {LI_TUNNEL_MOUTH}'>>

<<FILL role=choice words=118 beats='BOTTLENECK: every descent meets at {LI_TUNNEL_MOUTH} beneath the lighthouse, a low brick passage running out under the rock toward the sea; it branches three ways, toward {TN_KEEPER_DOOR}, toward {TN_STORE}, and toward {TN_SEAGATE_GATE}'>>
<<FILL role=choice words=96 beats='{TN_KEEPER_DOOR} is oak bound in brass, {KEEPER}'s mark burned into it; a heavy beam has fallen across the passage just before it'>>
<<FILL role=choice words=92 beats='{TN_KEY} slides into the lock and turns halfway, then jams on rust; it will need coaxing, or a harder shove'>>
<<FILL role=rising words=90 beats='the lock gives with a soft clunk and {TN_KEEPER_DOOR} swings inward on {CM_ROOM} beyond'>>
<<FILL role=choice words=90 beats='{TN_WARD_GATE} sticks fast; forcing it might snap the old wards, or she can breathe, ease it back, and try again'>>

choices.label: Ease it back and re-seat the key.

nodes.body: <<FILL role=choice words=92 beats='{TN_BEAM_GATE} blocks the way; she can lever it clear with care, or drop and squeeze through the narrow gap beneath it'>>
<<FILL role=choice words=96 beats='{TN_STORE} is stacked to the brick roof with crates and barrels, none of them stamped; {TN_LEDGERBOX} sits on the topmost crate'>>
<<FILL role=rising words=90 beats='{TN_CRATE} is full of untaxed lamp oil and fine cloth, a smuggler's haul hidden in a dead man's tower; a low door leads on to {CM_ROOM}'>>
<<FILL role=rising words=90 beats='{TN_LEDGERBOX} confirms what she has already pieced together, sealing the case; a low door leads deeper toward {CM_ROOM}'>>
<<FILL role=choice words=92 beats='the low door opens on the passage to {CM_ROOM}, but {TN_LANTERN} gutters low and threatens to leave her dark'>>

choices.label: Stop to trim and relight it.

nodes.body: <<FILL role=rising words=88 beats='she trims the wick and the flame steadies; by its light the passage runs straight to {TN_KEEPER_DOOR}'>>

choices.label: Follow the passage to the room.

nodes.body: <<FILL role=choice words=94 beats='{TN_SEAGATE_GATE} lets the tide breathe in and out; beyond it the open water heaves, and the lower bars are slick and rising with the sea'>>

choices.label: Watch the water climb and think twice.

nodes.body: <<FILL role=choice words=92 beats='{TN_SEAGATE_GATE} grinds open a hand's width, enough to slip through onto an inner ledge; {TN_CURRENT} tugs, strong and cold'>>
<<FILL role=rising words=88 beats='she waits out the surge on the ledge, then steps inside where a dry passage climbs to {CM_ROOM}'>>

<<FILL role=choice words=120 beats='BOTTLENECK: all routes end in {CM_ROOM}, snug and dry under the sea; a lamp, a bunk, a desk, and on it {CM_LETTER} that answers everything, the truth of where {KEEPER} went, the smuggler who drove him out, and {LAMP_RIG} he left burning as a warning; now {HERO} must decide what to do with it all'>>
<<FILL role=choice words=98 beats='{CM_LETTER} is addressed, to whoever is brave enough to climb; she can read it to the very end, or keep it safe and carry it out unread'>>

<<FILL role=choice words=105 beats='{CM_LETTER} tells it plain, {KEEPER} did not vanish, he fled the smuggler's threats and hid inland, leaving {LAMP_RIG} so the town would come looking; three things end the page, {CM_MAP}, {CM_CONFESSION}, and {CM_PLEA}'>>
<<FILL role=choice words=96 beats='{CM_MAP} inks a path to {CM_COTTAGE}; she can go straight to it and find the old keeper, or take word first to {CM_HARBOUR_OFFICE}'>>

<<FILL role=rising words=92 beats='{CM_CONFESSION} is unflinching, years of small blind eyes turned for a little money, then the night the smuggler wanted everything; reading it, {HERO} sees exactly who did what, and how to set the record straight'>>

<<FILL role=rising words=90 beats='{CM_PLEA} is simple and human, please tell them I am sorry and please light the tower true; the words settle on {HERO} like a task handed down, and she knows she will not put it down'>>

<<FILL role=rising words=90 beats='{HERO} decides {CM_LETTER} is not hers to open all the way; she folds it carefully into her coat, its seal unbroken, to place in the right hands when the sun is up'>>
<<FILL role=choice words=98 beats='{CM_STORE} is the whole case laid bare; she can photograph the crates and ledger as evidence, or follow the passage deeper to where the goods truly end up'>>

<<FILL role=choice words=94 beats='with the crates and ledger box framed on her phone, {HERO} has proof no one can wave away; she can signal {CM_COASTGUARD} now or carry it straight to {CM_HARBOURMASTER}'>>
<<FILL role=choice words=96 beats='deeper in, the passage opens on a hidden hoard the smuggler stashed for himself; {CM_COMPASS} sits on top, easy to pocket'>>

<<FILL role=rising words=90 beats='{HERO} maps the whole hidden hoard with her phone, crate by crate, so nothing can be denied or lost; it is more than enough to bring the law down on the tower's secret keeper for good'>>

choices.label: Take the record to the authorities.

nodes.body: <<FILL role=choice words=92 beats='{CM_COMPASS} is beautiful and would prove everything in an instant; her hand hovers, and she weighs taking it against leaving it be'>>

choices.label: Leave it and photograph it instead.

nodes.body: <<FILL role=choice words=98 beats='{LAMP_RIG} can still be saved for good use; she can relight the tower as a true lamp again, or study {CM_SIGNAL_RIG} built to warn passing ships'>>

choices.label: Relight the lamp as a true light.

nodes.body: <<FILL role=choice words=94 beats='the old lamp will burn if {CM_MIRROR} is set true and {CM_GEARS_GATE} turn clean; she can align {CM_MIRROR} by {KEEPER}'s marks, or force {CM_GEARS_GATE} to move'>>
<<FILL role=rising words=90 beats='{CM_MIRROR} aligned and wick trimmed, the lamp catches and a strong clean beam swings out over the water for the first time in a year'>>

choices.label: Send the light out to sea.

nodes.body: <<FILL role=choice words=92 beats='{CM_SIGNAL_RIG} can flash a coded call; she can rig it now to call {CM_COASTGUARD} for help, or simply log how the whole clever thing was made'>>

choices.label: Rig it to call for help.
Log the signal for the record.

nodes.body: <<FILL role=choice words=96 beats='the fog is thick and {HERO} is tired; she can head straight back to town with what she knows, or take a moment to mark the way so others can follow'>>

<<FILL role=rising words=88 beats='{HERO} takes one last look at {CM_ROOM}, then turns for the long foggy walk back to town with the whole strange night stored up in her head, ready to tell in the morning'>>
<<FILL role=choice words=92 beats='she can leave {JOURNAL} open on the desk as a signpost, or carry it out and hand it to the town in the morning'>>

<<FILL role=failure words=85 beats='{A_DESK_DRAWER} splits and jams the desk shut on her sleeve; by the time {HERO} works free the fog has thickened and she decides {ROUTE_A_PLACE} has kept its secrets for tonight, safe but no wiser, and heads out to wait for morning'>>

<<FILL role=failure words=85 beats='{A_BRICK_GATE} brings a small slide of rubble that seals the cavity and fills the room with dust; coughing, {HERO} gives up {A_HEARTH} and settles by the door to wait out the night, unharmed and unsolved'>>

<<FILL role=failure words=85 beats='{B_RAIL_GATE} groans and sags under her hand and she snatches herself back to safety; {B_GALLERY} is too rotten to trust, so {HERO} retreats into the lamp room to wait for dawn, shaken but sound'>>

<<FILL role=failure words=88 beats='{C_TIDE_GATE} slides in faster than she guessed and {C_PASSAGE} floods to her knees; {HERO} wades back to a high dry ledge and settles to wait for the water to fall, cold and unsolved but perfectly safe'>>

<<FILL role=failure words=85 beats='wedged in {C_GAP_GATE}, {HERO} breathes out and wriggles carefully back the way she came; the far chamber will keep its secret tonight, and she picks a route out to firmer ground'>>

<<FILL role=failure words=85 beats='{D_RUNG_GATE} snaps and drops her a short jarring way to the boathouse floor; nothing broken but her pride, {HERO} decides {D_LOFT} can wait and limps out to the shore to wait for light'>>

<<FILL role=failure words=88 beats='the wind slams {D_DOOR_GATE} and rattles the whole leaning shed until a shelf of gear comes down across the hatch; {HERO} judges it too risky tonight and steps out into the fog to head back for town'>>

<<FILL role=failure words=86 beats='{JR_CELLAR_GATE} gives all at once onto cold blackness and the lantern flame gutters out; rather than grope on blind, {HERO} eases the door shut and climbs back to the landing to wait for a safer hour'>>

<<FILL role=failure words=85 beats='{ST_STEP_GATE} crumbles under her boot and drops her shin-deep into the stair; {HERO} hauls herself out, heart pounding, and decides {JR_HIDDEN_STAIR} is too far gone to trust tonight'>>

<<FILL role=failure words=85 beats='{LI_ROPE_GATE} frays through in her grip and she catches herself hard against {LI_STAPLES}; badly rattled, {HERO} climbs back up and gives up {LI_SHAFT}, the tunnel unreached this night'>>

<<FILL role=failure words=85 beats='{LI_FOG_GATE} thickens on {LI_LADDER} until she cannot see the next rung or the ground below; {HERO} will not climb blind over rocks, so she edges back up and waits for the mist to lift'>>

<<FILL role=failure words=85 beats='she forces {TN_KEY} and {TN_WARD_GATE} shear with a snap, jamming {TN_KEEPER_DOOR} for good; the sealed room stays sealed, and {HERO} turns back with the mystery half-told'>>

<<FILL role=failure words=86 beats='halfway under {TN_BEAM_GATE} it shifts and settles heavier, pinning her coat until she twists free of it; the near miss is enough, and {HERO} backs out of the passage to find a safer way another day'>>

<<FILL role=failure words=87 beats='{TN_SEAGATE_GATE}'s lower bars are already awash and the cold water surges to her waist; {HERO} wades back to the dry passage and decides the tide has won this round, safe but stopped short'>>

<<FILL role=failure words=88 beats='{CM_COMPASS} in her pocket, {HERO} turns to go and a hidden bell-wire chimes through the tunnel; guilty and flustered, she puts it straight back, and by the time she climbs out the dawn patrol is waiting to ask hard questions, the evidence spoiled by her own hand'>>

<<FILL role=failure words=86 beats='she forces {CM_GEARS_GATE} and they lock solid with a crack, jamming the whole lamp mechanism for good; the tower will not light tonight, and {HERO} climbs down disappointed, the beam still dark over the water'>>

<<FILL role=completion words=100 beats='{CM_COTTAGE} leads {HERO} to a low shepherd's cottage where {KEEPER} himself opens the door, grey and blinking but alive and well; the vanished keeper is found, the year-long mystery solved from end to end, and together they plan how to set the whole story right; the fullest, brightest ending'>>

<<FILL role=completion words=96 beats='{HERO} carries {CM_LETTER} and {CM_MAP} to {CM_HARBOUR_OFFICE} at first light; within the hour a search party sets out for the moor, and by noon {KEEPER} is home again, cleared and welcomed, the mystery closed by her word'>>
